mission.title: Install and Configure Carvel on Kubernetes
mission.description: Ytt is a YAML templating tool that allows you to manage complex configurations using reusable templates and structured YAML. Installing ytt helps streamline your configuration management process, making it easier to handle environment-specific values and custom validations.

steps.title: Install Carvel CLI tools
steps.description:
Install the Carvel tool suite using the install script:
```bash
curl -L https://carvel.dev/install.sh | bash
```
Or install individual tools via Homebrew:
```bash
brew tap carvel-dev/carvel
brew install ytt kbld kapp imgpkg vendir
```
See https://carvel.dev/ytt/docs/latest/install/

steps.title: Verify installation
steps.description:
Check that all Carvel tools are installed:
```bash
ytt --version
kapp --version
kbld --version
imgpkg --version
vendir --version
```

steps.title: Try ytt templating
steps.description:
Create a simple ytt template:
```bash
cat > config.yml << 'EOF'
#@ load("@ytt:data", "data")
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: #@ data.values.name
data:
  greeting: #@ data.values.greeting
EOF

cat > values.yml << 'EOF'
#@data/values
---
name: my-config
greeting: hello world
EOF

ytt -f config.yml -f values.yml
```

steps.title: Deploy to Kubernetes with kapp
steps.description:
Deploy the rendered output to a cluster:
```bash
ytt -f config.yml -f values.yml | kapp deploy -a my-app -f - -y
```

resolution.summary: Carvel tools (ytt, kapp, kbld, imgpkg, vendir) are installed for Kubernetes-native application configuration and deployment.

uninstall.title: Remove Carvel tools
uninstall.description:
```bash
# If installed via script
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/{ytt,kapp,kbld,imgpkg,vendir}

# If installed via Homebrew
brew uninstall ytt kapp kbld imgpkg vendir
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade Carvel tools
upgrade.description:
```bash
# Via Homebrew
brew upgrade ytt kapp kbld imgpkg vendir

# Or re-run the install script
curl -L https://carvel.dev/install.sh | bash
```

troubleshooting.title: ytt template syntax errors
troubleshooting.description: Use the online playground to test templates: https://carvel.dev/ytt/#playground

troubleshooting.title: kapp deploy fails with RBAC errors
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure you have the correct kubeconfig context and RBAC permissions:
```bash
kubectl config current-context
kubectl auth can-i create configmaps
```

troubleshooting.title: imgpkg push authentication error
troubleshooting.description:
Log in to your container registry:
```bash
docker login myregistry.io
```

prerequisites.description: No Kubernetes cluster required for ytt templating. kubectl and a cluster are needed for kapp deployments.
